limitations: Operator chat timing inside this slice is approximate unless anchored to repo receipts.
The 0.6.21 package report proves build inventory only; it records distributed:false and does not establish live prerelease authority.

entries.speaker: operator
entries.message: The operator explicitly reset the lane to basics only: be boring, do not layer solutions, and fix the remaining playlist-truth seam before any more audio/video experimentation.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: A bounded repo review confirmed that the remaining basics bug was playlist truth rather than next/previous step math: new presets were only saving mediaPath, and hosted loads could still revive an older broader playlist from a narrower request.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Built 0.6.21 cleanly with preset playlist capture and hosted stale-playlist reuse removed.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Regenerated the 0.6.21 package inventory with -SkipVarDistribute and confirmed the report still shows distributed:false, so the package exists only as build inventory and not as a live prerelease authority.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Redeployed the raw modern_tv hosted-player proof as the canonical 0.6.21 alpha dev_deploy seam and verified that the hosted proof receipt and live filesystem agree on the deployed preset path.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Refreshed the baseline direct-player raw asset to the same 0.6.21 alpha core and wrote a matching raw dev_deploy receipt so the full raw authority set is present on disk.

decisions: 0.6.21 is its own semantic version because playlist persistence and hosted playlist replacement behavior changed after 0.6.20 had already been built for testing.
The current live authority seam for this slice remains raw dev_deploy Custom artifacts, not the .var package.
This slice is basics-only: preserve playlist truth and do not layer new sync or naming behavior into the same recovery packet.
openQuestions: Does 0.6.21 restore truthful image next and previous behavior for the problematic hosted and preset-backed image cases?
How should older presets saved before playlist paths were recorded be handled if the operator still needs them to widen back into directory playlists?
What is the correct mixed-media playlist policy when the same playlist intentionally contains both images and videos?
notes: The 0.6.21 package report exists because the hosted proof wrapper expects package inventory, and the final report records distributed:false so the live authority did not drift away from raw dev_deploy.
Hydration lesson from 0.6.20 remains active: if receipt truth and filesystem truth disagree, the lane is not ready to call tested.
